name: Fruitgeddon
short_description: Blast through hordes of adorable yet deadly mutant fruits in this intense space shooter with bullet hell action. Shoot, dodge, and survive unique boss battles that push your skills to the limit. Only the strongest will uncover the truth behind the chaos. Are you ready to save the universe?
detailed_description:
Get ready for an intergalactic battle like no other! In this fast-paced space shooter with bullet hell action, you’ll face waves of adorable yet deadly mutant fruits threatening to destroy the universe. Only the most skilled players can dodge the chaos, shoot relentlessly, and uncover the dark truth behind the invasion.

Key Features

🚀 Intense Action – Shoot and dodge at high speed in a challenge where every second matters.
🍉 Unique Boss Battles – Each boss offers a different fight that will test your reflexes and strategy.
🌌 A Story with a Twist – Discover who's behind the chaos and prepare for a shocking revelation.
🎮 Hardcore Difficulty – If you love tough games and bullet hell challenges, this is your ultimate test.
🔫 Tight Controls – Master the art of dodging and shooting with smooth and addictive gameplay.

Are you ready to take on the mutant fruit invasion and save the universe? 🌠🔥

In Fruitgeddon, you don’t just survive the chaos – you shape it! Customize your weapons to match your playstyle: modify your shot type, adjust your firing angle, and create unique combinations to unleash maximum power against your enemies. In this world of fruity destruction, you decide how to fight. Do you prefer a barrage of projectiles or a precise, deadly shot? The choice is yours!

supported_languages: English, French, German, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian
